response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video contains two vocal songs performed by VTubers. 2. Identified Song 1: 'Lower' (ロウワー) by Nuyuri. Performed by Nekomata Okayu and Oozora Subaru. 3. Identified Song 2: 'UNDEAD' by Ayase. Performed by Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Oozora Subaru, and Shirakami Fubuki. 4. Searched and found full lyrics for both songs. 5. Mapped scenes to timestamps and populated JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two vocal song performances by Hololive VTubers. First, Nekomata Okayu and Oozora Subaru perform 'Lower' (ロウワー) by Nuyuri. After a short visual transition, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Oozora Subaru, and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'UNDEAD' by Ayase.

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu and Oozora Subaru perform 'Lower' (ロウワー). The video features the performers singing and dancing in a virtual concert setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そう簡単な祈りだった
端から段々と消える感嘆
今から緞帳が上がるから
静かな会場を後にさよなら
言いかけていた事が一つ消えてまた増えて
背中に後ろめたさが残る
従いたい心根を吐き出さぬように込めて
胸の中が澱のように濁る
受け止めたいことが自分さえ抱えられず
持て余したそれを守っている
霞んだ声はからからに喉を焼いて埋め尽くす
何を言うべきか分からなくて
感じてたものが遠く放たれていた
同じ様で違う なんだか違う
何時まで行こうか 何処まで行けるのか
定かじゃないなら何を想うの
僕らが離れるなら 僕らが迷うなら
その度に何回も繋がれる様に
ここに居てくれるなら 離さず居られたら
まだ誰も知らない感覚で救われていく
平穏とは消耗を以て代わりに成す
実際はどうも変わりはなく
享楽とは嘘で成る
「綻ぶ前にここを出ていこうか」と
都合の良い願いを同じ様に同じ様に呟く
何処から聞こうか 何を見失うか
定かじゃないから此処を動けない
僕らが疲れるなら これ以上無いなら
その度に何回も逃げ出せる様に
心が守れる様に 奪われない様に
互いに託して身体を預けてよ
君と泣く 君と笑う 君と怒る
君と歌う 君と踊る 君と話す
何時まで続くだろうと同じ様に同じ様に呟く
いま忘れないよう刻まれた空気を
これから何回思い出すのだろう
僕らだけが
僕らが離れるなら 僕らが迷うなら
その度に何回も繋がれる様に
ここに居てくれるなら 離さず居られたら
まだ誰も知らない感覚で
僕の生きている全てを
確かめて 正しくして
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It was a simple prayer, to begin with,
But my admiration gradually fades from now on.
Because the curtain rises,
I leave the quiet venue and say goodbye.
One of the things I was about to say disappeared,
And then increased again,
And a sense of guilt remains on my back.
I'll keep it in without spitting out the heart I want to follow,
Inside my chest it muddies like sediment.
I can't even hold the things I want to accept,
And I'm protecting that which I have more than I can handle.
My hazy voice dries out, burns my throat, and fills me up.
I don't know what I should say,
What I was feeling was set free to a distant place.
It looks the same but it's different, somehow different.
Until when will we go? Where can we go?
If it's not certain, what are you thinking of?
If we are going to part, if we are going to get lost,
I hope we can be connected over and over again each time.
If you stay here, if you don't let go of me,
I'll be saved by a feeling no one knows yet.
Peace is something that is replaced by consumption,
In reality, nothing has changed.
Enjoyment is made of lies,
"Shall we get out of here before it unravels?" I mumble,
That convenient wish, the same way, the same way.
Where shall we ask from? What will we lose sight of?
Because it's not certain, I can't move from here.
If we get tired, if there's nothing more than this,
I hope we can escape over and over again each time.
So that my heart can be protected, so that it won't be stolen,
Let's entrust ourselves to each other and lean on each other.
I cry with you, I laugh with you, I get angry with you,
I sing with you, I dance with you, I talk with you.
I mumble the same way, the same way, wondering how long this will last.
So I won't forget now, the air that was engraved,
How many times will I recall it from now on?
Only us.
If we are going to part, if we are going to get lost,
I hope we can be connected over and over again each time.
If you stay here, if you don't let go of me,
I'll be saved by a feeling no one knows yet.
Check everything of my life,
And make it right.

scenes.description: Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Oozora Subaru, and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'UNDEAD'. The performance is high-energy, with the performers dancing against a visually complex stage backdrop.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Oozora Subaru, Shirakami Fubuki

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unhappy?
Oh troubled child of man
Unlucky?
Even you, who are no longer human
Be happy!
Don't slack off, aim for it
Since you are alive after all
The past you turned your eyes away from
And the boring future
Counseling? Give me a break
Time and again, everywhere
Peace, peace
Hey... why is it
I feel like I'm fighting?
I don't want to touch it, I can't touch it
My past self, self, self, self
Contradicting a transparent ghost that's already dead
Deep in the memories, youthful and painful
Too bad? Even though you're already gone
Oh? You prefer that? How ironic
Is it your present self that's being seen through?
Nonsense
An unerasable label
Yes! The point is, it's a complex
It seems I'm possessed by it
Still wrapped around
Still won't leave
The self of days gone by
Undead
You're not dead
A chain of you and you
Being alive means to keep changing
Don't be content with misfortune
Don't give in to it
It's cowardly not to try to become happy
This world, this world is
A strange, strange fantasy
What will appear next, an ogre or a snake?
Meet, encounter, and finally the story begins
Come, are you human or a monster?
Enough with this, let's talk about something else
Peace, peace
Past & Future
Can't change the past
Past & Future
Run for the future
Cut in
Why is it
That I have no hope, no expectations
For the future?
I feel like that
I've been alive for a long time
Sick of the déjà vu and the templates
There's not even a sign of a wonderful event
Too bad
The cause and effect of the experience I've piled up
Mythology that has become a shell, and boring evolution
The point is, I want stimulation
I'm tired of it
I'm used to it
And so
The guidance that keeps setting me up
Increasing compliance
It feels like it's being covered up
Suck it all up
All of it, all of it, all of it
It all tastes the same
Undead
You're not dead
A chain of you and you
In every age
The past, the future, and the present are all here
Fulfill the act of being alive
Honestly
Aim for a happy ending
Undead
You're not dead
I'm telling you
Don't give up on happiness
Be human
If you're just used to suffering
And enduring it,
You're as good as dead
A corpse, an undead
Unhappy?
Oh troubled child of man
Unlucky?
Even you, who are no longer human
Be happy!
Don't slack off, aim for it
Since you are alive
Whether you soak in misfortune
Or become happy
Yeah, it's all, all on you
Time and again, everywhere
Everything, everything
All things in nature
Peace, peace
Past & Future
Can't change the past
Past & Future
Run for the future
Wherever there are people, there is always sorrow
Survive this story full of monsters
Written by: Ayase
